variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16348 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16348 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16348 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 233.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 130.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 482.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 470.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25667 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16348
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25667 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16348
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25667 premium Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
